candidates.rationale: Small line-field cases have direct closed-form references and are the safest first qualification candidates.
evidence_gaps: environment and solver-version provenance attached to the retained run
candidates.graduation_gate: analytic reference, tolerance provenance, and CI artifact must all be present before qualification

candidates.rationale: Classic beam, torsion, and frame cases are central to engineering trust and have textbook references.
required_artifacts: documented force and moment sign convention
candidates.graduation_gate: two independent canonical cases must pass with documented tolerances

candidates.rationale: 2D thermal and thermoelastic patches are needed before material heat-spreader claims can mature.
candidates.graduation_gate: mesh and boundary evidence must be linked from the operator reliability entry

candidates.rationale: Plane electromagnetic patches are important for dielectric and magnetic material screening.
candidates.graduation_gate: field, flux, and stored-energy checks must pass across at least two orientations

candidates.rationale: Modal workflows need convergence and mode-order evidence before serious vibration claims.
candidates.graduation_gate: mode frequencies and ordering must remain stable under documented refinement

candidates.rationale: The Stokes operator is intentionally screening-grade; it now has a second boundary response but still needs explicit scope and qualification evidence before higher trust.
candidates.graduation_gate: do not qualify until the Stokes-only screening scope and divergence tolerance provenance are documented
